sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ عَبْدُاللهِ دَرْسَ الجُغْرَافِيَا أَكْثَرَ مِنْ غَيْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Abdullah je volio čas geografije više od ostalih.
sentences.translationEn: Abdullah liked geography class more than others.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى الخَرَائِطِ بِاهْتِمَامٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Gledao je u mape s velikim zanimanjem.
sentences.translationEn: He looked at maps with great interest.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظَ أَسْمَاءَ بِلَادٍ كَثِيرَةٍ حَوْلَ العَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Zapamtio je nazive mnogih zemalja širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: He memorized the names of many countries around the world.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ أَنْ يُسَافِرَ إِلَى هَذِهِ البِلَادِ يَوْمًا مَا.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana htio je putovati u te zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: He wanted to travel to these countries someday.
